name: lcr_mpi_tool
description: CRITICAL: MUST USE THIS TOOL when the user explicitly mentions 'lcr_mpi_tool', 'GAN', 'I2SB', 'RDDM', or asks for 'image restoration', '영상 복원' of their uploaded medical images.

help.summary: Medical image restoration with GAN, I2SB, or RDDM.

modes.name: i2sb
modes.description: Run the I2SB restoration model with matching condition input when available.

notes: Runs on the active uploaded medical image.

model_type.description: Extract the exact image restoration model requested by the user. If the user says 'gan', output 'gan'.

runtime.notes: GAN runs fast on CPU. I2SB and RDDM are significantly faster on GPU.
